summary: Plan-only classification for the single hydrated PR. No mutations are recommended because merge proof is incomplete and checks could not be hydrated.

actions.reason: The PR looks like a useful focused contributor change and maintainer_can_modify is true, but merge cannot be recommended without current checks, mergeability, review-bot comment hydration, and Codex /review proof. Because fix and raise_pr are allowed, the next safe path is to repair/validate the contributor branch rather than merge now.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and validate contributor PR #88905 for merge readiness by refreshing live preflight, addressing any check/review blockers, running required review and targeted validation, then returning a merge-ready result if clean.
repair_candidate.pr_title: feat(dreaming): expose shadow-trial scoring in reports
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs and validates contributor PR #88905 so the Dreaming shadow-trial report can expose report-only scoring metadata while preserving the existing no-policy-decision/no-durable-write behavior.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88905
Credit: carries forward @iFiras-Max1's original implementation and tests.

Validation plan:
- git diff --check
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-shadow-trial.ts extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-shadow-trial.test.ts docs/concepts/dreaming.md
- node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/dreaming.md
- ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-shadow-trial.test.ts
- npm run check:changed

Before merge, refresh live checks/mergeability, hydrate review-bot comments, run Codex /review, and address any findings.
credit_notes: Contributor credit: @iFiras-Max1 authored the original focused implementation and should be credited in any replacement or repaired PR.
If a replacement PR is needed, its body should state that it carries forward attribution for @iFiras-Max1 and reference the source PR.
